name: Crockpot Chicken & Herb Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place the chicken in the crockpot.
3. Insert cloves into one onion.
4. Put all onions into the pot.
5. Add garlic, marjoram, thyme, bay leaf, and wine to the pot.
6. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 6 hours.
7. Remove bay leaf and cloves from the pot.
8. Stir in sour cream.
9. Increase heat to high.
10. Combine biscuit mix with parsley, stir in milk until well moistened.
11. Drop dumplings around the edge of the pot.
12. Cover and cook on high for 30 minutes.
